revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|

}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{{caption |{{#ifeq:{{{2|{{NAMESPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}} |In this {{lcfirst:{{NAMESPACE}}}}space |Pages with the prefix '{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}' in the '{{if empty|{{{2|}}}|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}' and '{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}' namespaces }}: }}}{{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no subject namespace|}}}}}|no|

[[{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{{2|{{SUBJECTSPACE}}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}} {{#ifeq:{{YesNo-No|{{{no talk namespace|}}}}}|no|
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{#ifexist:{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |
[[{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
}}{{Special:Prefixindex/{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{{2}}} talk|{{TALKSPACE}}}}:{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}/}}
|}}
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
